    • Uses of FeatureClientErrorStrategy in fr.maif

      Classes in fr.maif with type parameters of type FeatureClientErrorStrategy 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  FeatureClientErrorStrategy<T extends FeatureClientErrorStrategy<T>>
      Strategy to use when one feature activation status can't be fetched or computed locally.
